productDisplayName: Puma Men Cell Varex SL Black Sports Shoes
description: When you're a busy man on the go, you want a shoe that can transition as quickly as you can. The puma Cell Varex has everything you'll need to train and looks good when teamed with casual wear.UpperAir mesh upper offers excellent breathabilitySynthetic leather overlays provide added midfoot supportPadded tongue and collar for extremely snug FitCentral lacing for a snug, customised fitOutsole embedded onto the toe box for better shock absorptionMidsoleMolded EVA sockliner offers superior cushioning and supportEVA and TPR heel unit offers the ultimate cushioningEVA in the forefoot provides you with added cushion during trainingOutsoleEverTrack rubber composite outsole supplies optimal durability in high-wear areasArchTech technology in the design of this pair offers you the necessary support required to sprint
